111.content:
Sonic is the one getting fat, but why is the fastest thing alive becoming obese.
1. Force feeding: Sally decides to force feed Sonic because she loves him.
2. Willingly: Sonic understands that Sally likes Sonic with extra padding.
3. Overeating: Sonic is hit by a machine that Robotnik created, now Sonic can't stop eating and is gaining a lot of weight, and Sally agrees to take care of him, a time to now show her true feelings for Sonic.
111.title: Sonic

choices: Bacon, Cereal, Hash Browns, & Hot Chocolate.
112.content:
Based on an old Fanfic by FatSallyAcorn a fellow author that I feel as if has gone too long without a sequel, Sadly she has disappeared so the task is up to you.

'Don't be ridiculous Sonic that's just a fairy tale.' Sally said one arm around Sonic and the other holding a dusty old lamp. Sonic was holding Sally as he whizzed through the forest, back to knothole village. They had found the lamp abandoned in a lifeless part of the forest, under some tangled bushes.
'Aw come on, Sal, let me have my fun.' The blue hedgehog said, as they zoomed into the village. He halted in front of their hut. Recently the two had gotten married, and shared the same place.
However, even though now Knothole was peaceful and no longer under the threat of Robotnik, they were still going through difficult times. The village, along with several others, was suffering a severe drought, and as a result, it was almost impossible to farm, and there was barely any food to eat.
'Well, I'll admit it does need a bit of polishing.' The squirrel/chipmunk hybrid held the golden lamp up to the sun to examine it. Sonic stepped back a little to admire his wife's beauty. She wasn't the curviest or bustiest Mobian alive, but he still couldn't get enough of her body. And though her beauty wasn't what you would call traditional, he still found her absolutely gorgeous. 'Hey, Sal, have I ever told you, you look hot?' Sonic asked, putting an arm around her.
'Only a thousand times.' Sally replied, lowering the lamp and smiling back at him. The two embraced and began passionately kissing each other. Sonic managed to hold Sally up and, while kissing her, stumbled through the door of their hut and onto their bed. Sally was just pulling her vest off when the couple was startled by a knock on the door.
'Um, sorry to uh, interrupt your uh, fun, but there's something you guys need to see.' The villager looked serious, but his cheeks were flushing due to the embarrassing situation he just walked in on.
'Oh, no, this is...This...oh, no...' Sally was speechless. In front of her, a huge garden, which was once Knothole's only food source, was absolutely marauded. What plants were ready to be harvested were gone, and what was not yet fully-grown was uprooted and torn apart. Several villagers were searching around for what little was left, but there was close to nothing.
'Wh-Who...how...?' Rotor, who was standing next to her, sighed, rubbing his head. 'It was probably some of Robotnik's old robots...' Sally was devastated. Almost ten years after defeating him, he was still causing them so much grief. How on earth could her village survive though this? 'H-How much food is left in storage?' She asked quietly, almost not wanting to hear the answer.
'Well, we've got about a couple weeks' worth of food left for the entire village.' The walrus replied. 'But with this weather, it'll take much more than that to grow back enough to keep up.'
'Looks like we'll have to get everything out of the forest from here on out.' Sonic said, after being surprisingly quiet for so long. 'But that won't be a problem, I can find more than enough for everyone to eat faster than you can say-'
'Everything in the forest is poisonous, Sonic.' Sally sighed, walking back towards the hut. 'I need some time to myself to think about what to do.'
As soon as she was in her hut and had shut the door behind her, Sally burst into tears. What do I do now? She thought. How am I going to keep everyone from starving to death, I've already rationed food enough as it is, I can't have everyone eat even less....Oh, this is my fault somehow, I know it! She wiped off her eye. She glanced over at her nightstand and saw the lamp she'd left there.
'Oh, I could really use a genie right about now...' She mumbled, picking up the lamp. In spite of herself, she began rubbing off some of the dust. Then, to her surprise, it started glowing. 'Oh my gosh-' Sally stumbled backwards, still holding the lamp. She ran outside and saw Sonic talking to a group of villagers.
'Sonic, Sonic! Look at this!' She showed him the glowing lamp. He blinked and took it from her. 'No way....did you-' 'Yes!' Now the villagers saw the lamp and gasped. 'Could that be...?' 'Is it really?' 'It's not possible!'
Silently, Sonic rubbed the lamp some more, and it began glowing brighter. Excitedly, he began rubbing it against his arm, when it have a blinding flash of light and shot in the air. It burst into a colorful cloud in the air, and then, a large Lion's head, sporting a turban, emerged from this cloud. All the Mobians could only stare and catch flies in their mouth.
'I am the Genie of the Lamp.' The lion's head declared loudly. Now much of Knothole village, attracted by the loud noise, came running to see what was going on. 'For setting me free, you shall be granted one wish, but choose carefully...' The lion's head lowered a little and narrowed its eyes. 'For whatever you wish will require a great personal sacrifice on your part.'
The two leaders we stunned. 'What do we wish for?' 'I know.' Sally stood up a bit straight. 'I wish for all this famine to end, I want Knothole restored to the glory it once was, maybe even something better!' She lowered her head. 'Please, I'm willing to give anything...' 'Your wish is granted, but at a price.' the genie replied. 'That price is your beauty.' 'M-My what?' Sally blinked, not sure she heard him correctly.
'The state of a leader reflects the state of their subjects. A ruler with a great girth gives the impression that their subjects also enjoy a healthy, profitable lifestyle. So, to improve your village's condition, you must gain as much weight as possible.' Sally began to speak, but was interrupted by the genie. 'The only way to save you village, is to sacrifice your beauty and gain as much weight as possible. Be the fattest woman you can be.' And with that, the genie disappeared into another bright cloud and floated away.
Chapter Two
'Come on, Sally, you said you'd give anything...' 'Sonic, I can't make a pig of myself while everyone starves.' The two were in their hut again; Sally was sitting up on her bed, Sonic standing next to her.
'Look, the villagers were more than happy to share a bunch of their food, the least you can do is eat what you were given.' He held up his arm towards the other side of the hut. The villagers had given Sally plenty of food alright. Enough to fill up half of the place, barely leaving room to walk. Mainly anything that wasn't fruits and vegetables, in hopes of Sally gaining as much weight as possible.
'Sonic, there has to be more than enough to feed the village for two days! I can't eat all of this-' 'Not in one sitting.' 'You're jabbering me to live on this stuff?!' 'Well, how else are you supposed to get big enough to save the village?' Sally began to argue back, but then sighed. After a minute of silence, she walked to the table.
'Well, anything for the village, I guess...' She looked around. 'What on earth do I eat...?' 'Here' Sonic held up a large plate of biscuits. 'It'll be easy to work your way through these.'
Sally sighed and sat herself down. Sonic placed the plate in front of her. She began to reach for one when Sonic stopped her. 'Wait, you know what these need?' 'Sonic, what are you-' Sonic became a blue blur, speeding through the food and biscuits. When he stopped, the biscuits all had butter on them, which was now melted from moving so fast. Sally glared at him.
'You're not helping.' she muttered, glaring at her husband. 'Hey, butter is nothing but fat, just trying to help.' Sonic said with a grin. Sally sighed again and took a biscuit. 'Well...down the hatch.'
Being hesitant to start becoming fat after being slender her whole life, Sally went through the biscuits slowly. She took as small bites as possible and chewed them for ridiculous amounts of time before finally swallowing them. They were rather large, so it only took about five of them for her to feel full.
'Alright, I'm finished.' Sally began getting up, but Sonic put his hands on her shoulders to force her down. 'No, eat.' He said, getting slightly impatient. 'Knothole's counting on it.'
'But...but...' Sally sighed and bit into another biscuit. Now they didn't taste as good, and soon her stomach began to hurt. She wanted to stop, but she kept herself going with mental images of Knothole as it used to be. Ten biscuits down, she had to pause in order not to puke all over the table. But she still forced each one down, one after the other. After a little over twenty, she sat back in her chair and groaned. Her stomach, which was flat and even had a bit of muscle to it, was now round and beginning to stick out.
'I feel like I'm going to burst!' moaned Sally, putting a hand on her aching belly. In front of her, only one more biscuit remained. Sonic picked it up and held it in front of her.
'Come on, Sal, you've only got one more to go...' Sonic said teasingly, waving the biscuit in front of her. She looked as if she was about to vomit.
'Oh, I feel awful...I'm going to bed.' she mumbled, struggling out of her chair. Sonic was about to start teasing her with the biscuit again, but decided against it and dug into it himself. She glanced over at Sally, who was already passed out in bed. Sonic observed her again. She was lying on her back, with her stomach hanging out on top. Before he went to bed, he put a heating pad on it, to help her feel better.

(my addition) Sonic then began to ponder about what he should cook for her in the morning for her breakfast given the situation the meal's portions would have to be both gut-busting massive, and as fattening as Lard.

(Here is were you come in this story has gone with out a follow up for more than 6 years. Please make it a good and lengthy one it disserves as much.)
112.title: Sally's Wish

choices: Sally settles for belly rubs instead of a digestion potion.
Sally decides to drink the potion.
1121.content:
Considering different options, Sonic settled for making a high sugar, high fat breakfast to optimize Sally's gaining process. He decided to wake up an hour earlier than usual to get everything prepared and study the recipe books. A great cook he wasn't and never sinned with patience, but for the sake of making the whole experience less miserable for his wife, was willing to sit down and learn.

Leaving books opened on the corresponding recipes, Sonic began adding and mixing the ingredients for three dishes at the same time, each in a different pot, all slowly and carefully, afraid of burning anything and letting the food go to waste. This multitasking process was quite difficult for the blue hedgehog, but that's what was so exciting about it - setting the bar high and overcoming the challenge.

The red haired chipmunk's nostrils were hit with a rather pleasant combination of sweet smells, stimulating her senses. The fragnance peaked her curiosity as to where it could possibly come from. Wide awake, Sally stretched the arms and rose from the bed.
"Well, this is unusual" - she said. But, It wasn't the only surprise waiting for her.

The other one was discovered right after taking off the heating pad.

It became apparent where the butter glazed biscuits went. Sally's once flat, toned stomach now displayed some roundness, possible to pinch with two fingers. A small belly roll protruded from her waistline, being an ominous reminder of how "bad" the things would become in the not so distant future.

It was an uncomfortable feeling, knowing you developed some extra chub, while everyone else is underfed, even Rotor, who tremendously cut down on his meals and had to shrink his toolbelt for it to continue staying on his frame.

Her hips grew a bit as well. Now curvier than before, were probably the only good thing she thought came out of the yesterday's binge. If only she could stay like that, minus the belly, that'd be great. Reality however, was brutal. This whole thing had to go on and on until inevitably reaching obesity. The clouds of doubt gathered around her, putting her determination into question.

Snapping back to reality, Sally headed towards the smell's source, which turned out to be the kitchen, with Sonic standing in front of the pots.

"You can cook? - Sally asked, surprised.
"Thought I'd give it a try. Drop some weight off your shoulders. Speaking of weight..." - Sonic pinched her stomach, smiling - "You seem to have put on a few!"
"Yeah. I'm slowly turning into a disgusting pig..." - her face adopted a gloomy tone.

"Aww, don't be like that. I hate seeing you sad." - Sonic whispered, raising her chin with his hand" - Don't you remember? No matter what happens, you have me, Tails, Bunnie, Nicole and all the other friends cheering you on, ready to support you no matter what. Who cares if you become a pig? We will still love you."

"W-well, that's true..."
"Of course it is! We are with you 101 percent. Now, sit down, eat and quit worrying so much." - Sonic finished, giving his wife a smooch. Her face brightened with hope instantly.

The chipmunk's rump plopped obediently on the nearest chair. She gazed upon the huge pile of bacon toasts, slathered with a thick layer of butter from each side, then placed them in her mouth. Not bad! There were a couple of things that could've been improved, like more cheese or spices, but for a first attempt, they came out decent.

"How are they? Better than the green slop Rotor used to serve?" - he laughed, although a bit nervously.
"Don't sell yourself so short, honey. I think they are quite delicious. Keep it up and you'll go places!" - Sal quickly reassured him by finishing the plate to prove she wasn't lying. Her fingers were entirely covered in grease, dripping from the buttery bread; Instead of wiping them with a napkin, she proceeded to lick them clean. Her stomach was already looking quite full, but the meal barely just begun.

Then came waffles, covered with strawberry jam and a generous amount of whipped cream. Working a way through them proved to be more difficult, but manageable. Sally's gut kept on expanding further, bulging past the width of her breasts.

"You still have pancakes left! Come on!" - Sonic encouraged Sal, who looked really bloated right now, belly stuffed like a drum. Sally had to force herself to chew and swallow through the pancakes, despite her fullness. A loud groan let itself out from her insides.

"Sorry... Urp... But I have to do this..." - the chipmunk said to her gut, protesting against the torturous meal. "As much as I like the food, I wish I could actually enjoy it instead of doing, well, this."

Halfway through the pancakes, Sally groaned in pain and leaned back on the chair, panting.
"I can't! How am I supposed to get fat enough if I'm unable to eat a lot? And all the food will spoil eventually before I fnish it, then what? We don't have enough time!" - Sal started panicking

"It's tough, I know. But we need to stretch out your stomach to fit more food. The first days will be the worst, but then it will come easier!" - Sonic cheered her on.

"I just wish there was some way to speed up my digestion... Maybe then I would enjoy it..."

A brilliant idea rushed into the hedgehog's mind.

"Speed up digestion? That's right! I'll ask Rotor or Tails to make a potion! They worked on similar stuff in the past."

"Please do, I don't think I can keep at it like that every day...Ooooohhhh..." - moaned Sally with pleasure, after the blue blur started rubbing and caressing her stomach to ease the pressure. The way he moved the fingers around her inflated ball of a gut felt heavenly. A few burps escaped from it in response to being stimulated.

Then, he grabbed her hips, which were a bit fuller than yesterday and began squishing them. "Looks like some weight went into the right places" - he teased her, then patted her plump butt, making her blush.

"Much better, thank you, Sonic..." - she sighed in relief, her belly bulging a little bit less.

"Okay, I'll go to the lab for a while. Try to finish those pancakes while I'm out!" - said Sonic before leaving the hut.

After the belly rubs, Sally did indeed manage to fit the rest of the pancakes inside of her without issues. Maybe with his majestic hands, the whole experience won't be too bad after all.

This made her think: Does she actually need the potion, or can she do it all by (almost) herself? Besides, the potion could have some negative effects, some could even set them back on their goal. Is it worth the risk?
1121.title: Waffles, Pancakes, Bacon & Buttered Toast

choices: Her new weight didn't feel that bad...
Sally wasn't happy with her fattened up frame.
11211.content:
Nah, now that she realized Sonic had this hidden talent, there was no reason to risk her health with an unsafe potion anymore. His incredibly pleasant and delicate belly rubs ended up opening space for even more food.

Looking down at her swollen, reddened gut, she was surprised it could fit those pancakes, and yet, there was still room for more! Looked like this pile of sugary, fatty snacks brought by her friends will disappear way faster than anticipated. If only she found about it earlier, it would've spared a lot of pain.

Yeah, sounds crazy, but this might actually be fun! All the doubt left her mind completely. She will make it. As revolting as the end result may be, she shall prevail. From this point, Sally was dead-set on getting fat the legit way and could hardly wait for another stuff and rub combo.

Wanting to contact Sonic to let him know the potion is no longer necessary, Sally headed towards the living room to grab the grey handheld computer and summon her best friend, Nicole. Easier said than done, however. The chipmunk girl's overstuffed stomach made it difficult for her to get up from the chair, let alone walk. Each step was a bit painful, accompanied by the creaking sound of both the wooden panels and her belly, shaking like a water filled balloon. Carefully placing her feet on the ground one after another, Sally made it to the room. With a press of a button, the holographic lynx materialized herself in front of her:

"Hey, Sally! How can I he-" - her attention immediately switched to the chipmunk's protruding midsection - " Oh, my goodness! You look like you're about to explode!"

"I'm fine. I'm just doing what needs to be done." - replied Sally, Nicole nodding in agreement.

"Sonic certainly takes good care of you, doesn't he?" - the brown lynx teased her friend.

"Oh, you wouldn't believe. It's a shame I'll be looking like Eggman in the end." - Sally sighed.

"You know, I don't think you would look that bad with extra pounds. Here, let me demonstrate!"

The lynx girl was surrounded by a green, pearlescent grid, covering up her sleeveless purple dress and black pants. The green, pixelated letters flashed: "EDITING BODY".

After it has finished rendering, the grid disappeared, revealing a half naked body, coated in a generous amount of adipose. Nicole sported a D-cup pink bra, struggling to contain the mass of her breasts and wide panties, the groin area partially covered by the hefty belly. Her face plumped up as well, giving the beginnings of a second chin. The wide hips were harmoniously shaking along with the massive booty. Lynx turned around for Sally, showcasing the new look from every angle. Her entire body wobbled while switching from side to side.

"This is how you'll probably look after you become obese. What do you think?" - she jiggled her belly with one hand.

"Oooh, I...I'm not sure..." - Sally felt embarrassed, seeing her friend, whose fattened up body was on full display. Still, she couldn't help but stare at it.

"...On second thought, you look conflicted. Let's just pretend this never happened." - said Nicole sadly before switching back to the slender self. "Sorry, didn't mean to upset-"

"No, no, no, I'm not upset! I just... I need to sleep with that thought for a while. Thanks for the insight, though." - Sally spoke softly, comforting Nicole.

Afterwards, she explained the reason Nicole was called and sent her out to inform Sonic about the discovery.

While waiting for his return, Sally decided it was time for an 'inbetween meals' snack. Grabbing the pretzels from the bag, she marveled at the salty, doughy consistency of the bread. When was the last time she had one?
In the past, the red haired chipmunk barely ever touched that stuff out of fear of gaining weight. Now, it was advisable in order to fulfill her subjects' hopes and dreams.
So snack away she did, getting even more ridiculously bloated than she already was.

Finally, Sonic arrived back home. Following the sounds of crunches, they led him to the living room, where Sally lied on her back, devouring one pretzel after another.

"Wow, you weren't kidding when you said you had more room left." - stated the blue hedgehog, surprised over the size of the belly in front of him. - So, I guess you really don't need the potion, then?"

"Nah, your hands are all I need. Now come over here, I need more massaging." - she seductively beckoned him with her index finger.

A series of moans escaped Sally's mouth while being fondled around. A little pressure applied resulted in loud burps, getting rid of the air she swallowed during eating. Sonic was definitely enjoying himself, as evident by a huge grin on his face. He could've sworn Sally's breasts have gotten a little bigger, which could come as a result of already partially digesting her breakfast. Were the hips bigger too? Not sure.

"Mmmm, that was godly. Now, I gotta sleep this off..." - Sally sighed with satisfaction.
"See you at lunch, Sal." - he covered her with a blanket and gave a sweet kiss.

Happy and full of delicious food, Sally took a little nap... Her insides digested the meal and the unburnt calories stored themselves as fat...
11211.title: Sally settles for belly rubs instead of a diges...

choices: Sonic is cooking beef in honey sauce and bucatini.
Sonic is making a homemade pizza.
112111.content:
Afternoon.

Sally's gut has already dealt with the huge breakfast she was treated with, the feeling of fullness subsided. Instead, it was replaced with hunger. Woken up by the growls, she shrugged - all those sugary snacks must've empowered her cravings. She rose from the pillow and scratched her head.

So far, it's been great. Eating a lot of delicious food and relaxing in a warm, cozy bed was quite an appealing change of pace from the usual supervision of the entire village. Sonic temporarily took over that task, making sure the food - as little as there was left - was rationed properly. He prohibited Sally from walking around, as it would burn calories.

Calories?

For a moment, the sleepy brown chipmunk forgot about the purpose of these stuffing sessions. But, was quickly reminded of it after looking down on the bulge under the bedsheets.

She uncovered a plushy potbelly from beneath the blanket. Her once straight navel was now squashed under a developing belly roll. She tugged it with her fingers, making it jiggle. The little bump on her tummy was not so little anymore: fed with large portions of syrupy pancakes, now rested on her lap.
Speaking of lap, the legs grew even bigger, making her look really curvy, so did the butt, which despite its rapidly accumulated mass, remained supple and free of cellulite. Grabbing the freshly formed creases on her back, then belly and the hips, Sally came to a surprising conclusion: It didn't feel so bad after all! Sounds crazy, but the extra pounds were quite fun to fondle and play with. There was a lot to grab around her plump butt especially, but the favorite part was watching the belly rolls bounce from her meaty legs. It was quite cute, but she wondered if in the future it wouldn't become too much.

Regardless, she had a duty to fulfill for the sake of her people and that's a one thing she'd never forget.

Now, that tummy is not gonna feed itself!
112111.title: Her new weight didn't feel that bad...

1121111.content:
Luckily, Sonic was already here, back from business, to take care of her grow(l)ing stomach. The smell coming from the kitchen was even more appealing than breakfast: sweet, meaty and rich.

"Wow, Sonic is not only a speed runner, but a speed learner as well!" - Sally thought to herself, impressed by her husband's culinary skills.
Given how much her appetite grew, it was only a matter of few days before the chipmunk's body would turn into a lump of lard. It made her feel uneasy, but curious at the same time, with curiosity now slightly tipping the scales in its favor.

This gluttonous and hedonistic lifestyle would end eventually, so Sally enjoyed it while she still could.

Suddenly, a knock on the front door was heard. The mysterious guest turned out to be Bunnie the Rabbot. The golden furred, floppy eared girl came with a visit to check on her friend. Her metallic legs caused quite a noise inside of the hut.

"How ye doin', Sal?" - she waved at the sleepy chipmunk lounging on the bed.

"Oh, you know. Eat, sleep, eat, sleep." - Sally replied to her emaciated friend. - "Don't worry, I'll soon be done with it and you won't have to suffer anymore."

"Don't worry, we be hanging just fine so far!" - Bunnie's statement was immediately contradicted by a loud growl coming from her own stomach. - "Ok, maybe not THAT fine, but still! We believe in you! And you should too!"

She looked at Sally's plumped up figure and continued:

"And, ah see you been making quite a progress already! Sonic be spoiling you silly, eh?" - she patted Sally's chubby belly, chuckling. -"Once the genie guy gives us food, we will all get fat for you. Besides, you be looking really cute like that!"

"You think it's cute?" - the chipmunk replied, surprised.

"Yah! Whas wrong with some jelly on da belly? Means you're healthy! You go, girl! And Sonic, darlin', you keep her well fed all the time!" - a thumbs up popped up from the kitchen.

Shortly after, the blue hedgehog came into the bedroom, carrying a huge bowl full of stacked bucatini noodles, served with delicious looking ground beef, garnished with parsley and coated in a generous amount of honey sauce. He struggled to carry the whole thing, trying not to tip it over.

After placing it carefully on the table nearby, he dusted his hands: "Well, that was harder than I expected, but I think it came out okay." - he stated with satisfaction.

"Can't wait to try it, Master Chef Sonic." - Sal giggled.

"My, quite an appetite ya have there! Ah be seein' myself now. Have fun, y'all! - she smiled cheerfully, before exiting the hut.

"We will! See you later, Bunnie!"

Sally was deeply worried. The rabbit was not looking very good. She appeared to be in high spirits, but how much of that enthusiasm was real? Not wanting to let down her and others, Sally decided to pick up the pace even more. Doesn't matter if it will hurt, she had less time remaining than she initially thought. Goodness forbid someone like Tails or Cream collapse from hunger! They are still kids!

Instead of grabbing a fork, Sally dug straight in with her hands, shoveling the entire mouthfuls of greasy pasta into her mouth, much to Sonic's surprise. The flavor was amazing! The sauce filled out the bucatini tubes from the inside out, making them really rich and flavorful.

"Mmmm, so good! Sonic, mind replacing me in the kitchen from now on?" - they both laughed.
The chipmunk continued on stuffing her face, the lips and hands dripping with sweet sauce. She couldn't stop. She didn't want to stop. Her round potbelly started taking a shape of a balloon halfway through the meal.

"This won't do, Sonic, you need to make more." - she ordered him firmly, with full mouth.
"Are you sure?"
"Yes, for their sake. More!"

Right on time, before finishing the last pile, Sonic delivered a second one. Despite already being bloated, she kept on going.

"More..."

The third one was a chore. Despite of how delicious it was, she couldn't bring herself to take another bite. She wiped her face and hands with a wet napkin.

"Sonic, do your magic..." - she burped, feeling groggy and unwell. It took a lot of massaging her belly to finally make some room for the third plate. Then, no matter what, he just couldn't soothe her pain. She ate way too much, with her gut expanded to a size of a blimp.

"Sal, you are pushing yourself way too hard. Nobody expects miracles from you."
"Sonic... You know I have to do this... I'll be fine..." - she had trouble breathing due to the pain.
"Let me at least give you some sleeping pills, hon" - he grabbed the bottle from the drawer and gave one to the overstuffed chipmunk, but she refused.
"No. I'll end up skipping dinner." - she said decisively.

"Girl... You're one heck of a fighter, I'll give you that." - the blue blur sighed, then snuggled next to her and gave a soft kiss to the cheek.

Sal couldn't sleep. The nightmares of desolate Knothole Village invaded her dreams, with no soul in sight. That'd be the future if she failed. But there was no way a princess, a former Freedom Fighter would give up like that. Just a couple of binges left...
1121111.title: The smell of bucatini and beef!

choices: Sonic loved Sal's curvy, plump body.
Sonic teased Sal and promised a diet after all this.
11211111.content:
Sally examined her body in the bathroom mirror, after dealing with the immense mountain of carbs that was the previous meal.

"Oh, my."

Where did the thin chipmunk girl go? She was still there, just... covered by a thick layer of blubber...

Everything about her was chubby, including the face. Sally pinched the cheeks, noticing how much fuller they've gotten. Grabbing and pulling one of them, she saw the generous amount of fat hiding underneath them.

Her meaty, fluffy hands went down to the chin and Sally found herself able to grab it as well. While tilting the head down, the chipmunk witnessed the softness of her neck bending, forming small rolls. A prelude for double chin.

She decided to step back to take a better look at the rest of the body. Upon placing her swollen foot on the ground, the belly and breasts visibly jiggled.

Her round and plushy gut felt very malleable in her hands, like a chef preparing the dough for a cake. Its softness, combined with her brown fluffy fur, was really pleasant to touch. Sally tried pushing one of the fingers into the lard mass of her midriff, sinking in halfway through before being stopped by the abs buried underneath. Upon releasing her hand, the belly bounced back with an audible wobble.
After that, she went for a classic "grab with both hands and form a donut" approach. Jiggling it up and down, she couldn't help but giggle.

Out of curiosity, the chubby chipmunk pulled out her blue vest to see if it still fits. To no surprise, it was pushed outwards by her free, growing C-cups. The vest would not go all the way down to her tail level like usual, instead, stopping midway, revealing her muffin tops. Even the arm holes were a bit too tight now, considering the extra chub also accumulated in those places.

Sal looked from a profile witnessing her chunky, yet sturdy legs, with the buttocks significantly sticking out. She gave them a playful slap, which in turn made her gasp with how loud it was.

Sally was looking pretty excited and adored the plumpiness surrounding her. But what would Sonic think? Would he like it, or would he just put his supersized wife on a strict diet after the deal with the genie was over?
11211111.title: Goodbye thin, hello chubby!

choices: Sonic relied on magic and it backfired.
112111111.content:
Her cherubic face formed a smile, with the crimson light of the sleepy sun highlighting the freshly grown set of plump cheeks. That genie's concept of beauty was severely skewed - who said a fluffy girl could not be pretty? In Sally's eyes, it was no longer the case, as she gushed over her own chubbiness. It was a cold rainy night, and Shadow was resting, under a tree just big enough to keep him dry. He laid there in complete silence. That is until the thunder storm started.

He was jolted awake by the sound of a BOOM hitting the tree above him, as he looked up to check if the tree was on fire, Shadow saw a branch that was hit by the volt, come falling down. Shadow tried to get up as fast as he could, but the branch knocked him unconscious.

When Shadow awoke he was in a nice bedroom, an unfamiliar one, but a bedroom nonetheless. He tried to get up from the bed but found that to be impossible as he had a great sensation of pain coming from his legs. "Urgh!!" shadow muttered as he tried to inspect the damage only to find both of his legs broken and encased in their own separate casts.

This made him panic a bit as he searched the room to see why he was here and not a hospital. Then he saw a framed picture standing on a dresser beside the door, it was a picture of himself. one that looked as if it had been taken last month in one of Eggman's bases.

The oddest thing about it was that it's frame was a pink heart. "I guess this room doesn't belong to Eggman then." he thought to himself. This calmed him down a bit.

Just then the door opened, and in came Rouge the Bat, she slowly walked up to Shadow's bed and said, "Oh good your awake! Anything I can get you, you took a pretty big hit". Shadow responded, "I am kinda hungry"

Rouge then left but quickly returned with... "I had it made just for you." Rouge walked into the room, carrying a platter, with a huge pepperoni pizza on it.

"Thank you Rouge." Shadow said as he took a slice. He bit into it. "This is really good pizza Rouge! There's a flavor in here I can't make out though."

This made him eat a few pieces after which he could feel the pain killers begin to work, and he started to feel fairly good, if a bit tired.

The black hedgehog was wondering this, when he noticed that rouge was next to the bed. She was had one of her hands on her chin, she was also smiling with her mouth closed and her eyes half open. To his surprise Rouge closed her eyes puckered her lips and gave his fat belly a kiss. This made it grumble and Shadow blush. "Don't worry big guy, I'm having another one made for you right now." As Rouge gave this reassurance her tail was wagging as if it belonged to a happy dog and not a bat.

132.content:
Rouge's streak at pulling off amazing jewel heists, had lately began to falter. She had just returned to her apartment (with a elaborately decorated interior made from stolen jewels.) after a frankly disastrous heist. Not only did she fail to secure her prize, she almost got caught by the police. Despite the fact that she was carrying nothing other than her usual gear, flying back to her hideout felt oddly more labor intensive than usual.

But Rouge did not have time to think about this, for as soon as she entered through the moonlight window that she left open before setting off on the heist, she immediately walked over to the living room couch next to the kitchen, and passed out asleep on to it from nothing more than sheer exhaustion.

The next morning, Rouge was still quite groggy, as she could only think of, "making herself beautiful/ready" for the day. She took off her heist gear, the black rubber jumpsuit with white boots and put aside the glass cutting tools, she then put on a pink bathrobe and promptly began to eat her breakfast. 2 slices of Buttered Toast, 2 Waffles, 4 slices of Bacon, and a glass of apple juice.

After finishing, she went into the bathroom to brush her teeth and weigh herself as she normally did... but something about the number that the scale sent back to her seemed... wrong... It read that her weight was 10 pounds heavier than what she was familiar with. (110 pounds=normal, now it reads her weight as 120.)

"That can't be right! It must be broken... I'll..." before Rouge could finish her train of thought as to possible explanations, she heard her cell phone ring. Caller I.D. displayed that it was Shadow, Rouge having romantic feelings for him, picks up the phone, despite the fact that she could count the number of times Shadow called her on 1 hand, she was too tired to attempt to flirt with him, especially not over the phone, and because of this she told him, "Shadow... now is not a good time for..."

Unfortunately she was interrupted by an outburst of words from Shadow that immediately terrified her. "ROUGE!! YOU NEED TO GET OUT OF THERE RIGHT NOW!! THE POLICE KNOW WHERE YOU ARE!! THEY'LL BE THERE IN ABOUT 2 MINUTES!!" Rouge immediately realized that she will have to worry about her possible weight problem later as this obviously took a bigger priority. "HOW?!..." She Thought... then she suddenly remembered a detail that she had not noticed at the time from exhaustion and panic after tripping the alarm at the museum, she heard that she dropped something. At the time she dismissed it to be a metal file but when she reexamined the tools she took off only minutes ago she realized the keys to the front door of her apartment were not there.

With horror Rouge knew that mistake allowed the police to track her down. "I..." She stammered too horrified to move, Shadow must have heard/sensed her panic over the phone so he told her, "GRAB WHAT YOU CAN!! I'M GONNA USE CHAOS CONTROL!!" Rouge with as much haste as possible, grabbed the items that could be used for DNA testing if they were found by the police, her tooth brush, the jumpsuit, the dirty dishes, and the clothes on her back. Shadow then teleported into her living room holding the green Chaos Emerald, and after briefly blushing after seeing what she was wearing (despite all his attempts to conceal it.) He Grabbed Rouge with his free hand, arm wrapped around her Rouge couldn't help but blush at this as they teleported to Shadow's Hideout.

It was the old Egg Carrier 1 from Sonic Adventure 1, the 2 of them were on the outer deck behind the structure that housed the bridge.

As soon as they were safe they stared at each other for a second both blushing before stepping and looking away from each other in the usual awkward fashion that this type of event plays out. The awkward feeling quickly disappeared as Rouge noticed the horrible stench of low tide and soon realized that the place was filthy with seaweed, barnacles and even a few seagull's nests in the platforms above them. "Sorry I suppose the mess is to be expected. This place has spent the last 5 years drifting on the ocean." Shadow remarked and pointed out the mass of robots working to clean it. All of them and the ship simply abandoned by Eggman for failing him, "They've managed to clean up most of the filth since I reactivated this place 6 months ago, but it's still disgusting... at least on the outside... The interiors in the stern of the ship are all nice and clean." Rouge struggled whether to find this situation to be repugnant or inviting as she could've considered this to be her first date with Shadow, unfortunately, the current atmosphere was the worst possible place for it, but she still expressed gratitude that it was better than going to jail (though not by much she secretly thought.)

Rouge then noticed a strong wind, it was a draft of cold air that made her silently question the location of the ship, "Oh right... you see... right now we're 10,000 feet above the surface of the ocean." Fearing that the next wind could blow off her bathrobe and reveal the purple lingerie underneath it, Rouge immediately handed the dishes and jumpsuit to Shadow and proceeded to run to the nearest door.

The swimming pool area was what she found herself in, unfortunately she could not relax in it, for she had not brought a bathing suit with her, and the pool itself was empty.

Shadow then came inside, "I gave your gear to a maintenance robot to be put in storage." He then noticed that she was eying the swimming pool, "You should be glad it's no longer full of lobsters and plankton stinking up the place."

Rouge turned around and asked him, "Shadow why would anyone turn this old piece of junk into their hideout?" Rouge had never been to the egg carrier before, but she had heard the story of it's downfall, and seen pictures of it in it's prime. When she was working with Eggman, and as luck would have it, met Shadow. "After we and the others defeated Emerl, and the Metal Overlord before that. I came to realize that the various hideouts we used over time were only running mate solutions at evading trouble. So, when I learned of this thing, I went to find it thinking the fact that it is both mobile and forgotten by Eggman would make it an ideal base of operations. Unlike the other hideouts that were only good for their namesake. This one can do just about anything for people like us, and even if it is a bit of an attention grabber, we can hide it just about anywhere where there are no cities or people, the clouds, bottom of the ocean, perhaps even outer space if we're lucky and I can fix and upgrade it well enough to do all that." Rouge couldn't help but marvel at the brilliance of this choice. Alas the 5 years adrift and neglected have not been kind to it, still she did realize it was easier to fix and cleanup an old place than build a new one.

"The past 6 months have been nothing but a restoration job for me, The robots help and I do what I can to gather materials they can't make themselves. But still, the vast emptiness of this place can make a guy feel rather..." Shadow was obviously struggling to find the right word, as he was always better at expressing his ideas than his emotions.

"Lonely?" Rouge suddenly slipped that word out of her lips, that made the 2 of them blush. And the empty swimming pool smelling of chlorine didn't help steer the conversation to something else.

Speaking of empty, Rouge then heard her stomach growling. Shadow noticed this. "I... guess you haven't had breakfast yet. Perhaps those dishes were from last night?" Rouge felt too embarrassed to tell him that they were not. It was 10:30am so she merely wrote off her hunger to a form of jet-lag associated with teleporting to the other side of the continent.

Rouge then began to struggle to decide what to do next, her belly told her it needed a bite to eat, but her brain told her she needed a change of clothes, and her still aching feet told her to find where her a new bedroom to rest in before anything else.

She then faced Shadow the both of them still blushing and told him in a tone expressing embarrassment, "I... I think I'll go find..."

"Okay, so here's the list. I'll be here cleaning." Blaze stated, handing a grocery list to her boyfriend Silver.

"Thanks, I'll be back soon. Love you." Silver said running out the door.

"Love you too!" Blaze shouted back before turning to get to work.

--------------------------------------------------

After several minutes of sweeping and dusting, Blaze decided to clean out from under the beds.

As she dug, she found some boxes of fairly normal things, such as old photos, some childhood toys and other memories.

However, one box she found stood out from the rest. A box that said simply said "PRIVATE"

Despite knowing that Silver would be furious if he found out that she had gone through his stuff, curiosity got the better of her, and she opened it up.

What she found inside shocked her. It was all magazines. Not just any magazines, pornographic magazines. Fat porn at that.

This left her speechless. She had just found out that her boyfriend had a fat fetish. She quickly put the magazines back in the box, and put everything under the bed.

She ran downstairs, and hopped on the couch. She turned on TV and decided to watch the news to get her mind off of what she found, but couldn't get the thought out of the back of her mind.

It just left her shocked, yet... Something about it intrigued her. She's always considered putting on a few pounds, but was too afraid to in fear of what people would think of her.

But this gave her full reason to do it. Now that she knew that Silver had a thing for fat girls, she basically had no choice not to.

She quickly called up Silver, and told him to pick up some sugar as well. He obliged, and hung up.

When Blaze put the phone down, she asked herself, "Should I tell Silver that I found his magazines, or should I let him figure it out.

After some thinking about it, she eventually decided to...

"Know you didn't have to *burp* do all this Silver my fire powers can just cook whatever we want." Blaze relayed this information with a mouth half full of a now gone fish sandwich. Over to Silver as used his telekinesis to 'hand' her an entire roasted turkey. (Author's note: I felt like adding that in because thanksgiving is coming up so shut up.)

"I just want to help you relax after all we have been through." Silver reassured her, the expression on his face conveyed a notion of sincerity. He then proceeded to take off the dark blue apron he wore, and carrying a small dish of corn on the cob with mashed potatoes and gravy for himself. He did all this hands free due to his telekinetic powers. Blaze was eying the turkey and had both hands on her belly. Now quite taunt with a meal worthy of a fest of 2 people. Yet Blaze's fire powers sped up the early stages of digestion so that this was not noticeable to her. For it was sticking out but not far enough to be labeled a, "potbelly." Her expression bore that of a minor degree of concern equally balanced with that of gratitude.

Blaze was indeed grateful at Silver's affection, for the ordeals of the latest adventure (not the events of Sonic 06 due to time travel that neither would remember and because that game is way to terrible to be cannon here) was a particularly exhausting one. At it's conclusion they began dating.

"Is... all this for me?" Blaze asked reluctantly already feeling moderately stuffed. "Yes... but... you don't have to eat it all just... eat as much as you can." Silver stated vaguely in an attempt to keep her suspicions low. Prior to the above mentioned fish sandwich Blaze had also eaten an 8 ounce beef steak and drank a wide glass of whole milk. Another was standing next to her incase she needed it for the turkey.

"All... alright if you insist." Blaze then tore of a drum stick and began to consume the meat Silver was lucky as she ate with her eyes closed and her free hand on her taunt belly. Lucky for he was blushing very much so. This desire of Silver's began 1 week prior on the day after their ordeal ended. They woke up at about noon, and they had a breakfast that was actually lunch at a seafood place that Blaze was picked herself. Silver ordered a small fried clam strip platter where Blaze more hungry than usual ordered a large plate of fish and chips. Silver couldn't help but blush and silently marvel at how hot Blaze looked as she ate the massive dish with a haste that somewhat disregarded the concept of table manners. It was lucky for Blaze that the food was ordered to go, so as no one but Silver saw her outburst of gluttony. And lucky for Silver that she was simply too tired to notice his revelry. He had been fostering that hunger ever since hoping to see it again but so far without success.

"OH!!! SO GOOD!!" Blaze moaned as she proceeded to eat the turkey one handful of meat at a time. Silver had long finished his own meal and was too preoccupied with the display before him to make anything else. There was an occasional belching from Blaze as she struggled to eat more, and more, and even more. To Silver's amazement, Blaze was able to finish the turkey. Bones picked clean of any and all meat, she proceed to tell him, "Silver... you really outdid yourself this time!*" Blaze told him this with her eyes still closed. She was holding her belly with both hands it was now distended enough to look like she was 4 months pregnant. Blaze then let out a very big and loud bleach as she was too deep in a food coma to notice that she just gained 5 pounds from one meal. She then asked, "Can I have some more milk Silver? I'm so thirsty..." Silver had apparently put too much spices on the meat. Blushing so red his face looked like he had severe sunburn. He picked up the glass with his real hand and used the other to hold up her head.

As Blaze drank it she effectively gained a 6th pound. When the glass was empty she then licked her own muzzle clean of the remnants and fell into a food coma induced sleep.

Silver wanted to kiss her so bad but ultimately decided against it for fear that it would wake her up.

The meal Blaze just had was effectively supper, and it was that time of year when the sun would set at 4:30pm it was now 6:30pm as Silver began to think about what she would be fed for breakfast tomorrow.

Tails was rather, intimidated, by the red vixen that had shown up at his home unannounced. Fiona Fox and him had a rather turbulent history in the past but he hadn't given up on helping her, and here she was now.
"I know you probably didn't expect me today" Fina sighed shaking her head as Tails blinked.
"I thought you were in Moebius still with... Scourge" Tails responded letting the vixen in out of politeness.
"I thought so too, it's complicated, I got out as soon as I could and I figured you'd be the only one who wouldn't turn me in right away..." she'd rather be up front and honest with the two tailed fox. "I know you probably still hate my guts but let my try to make it up to you" Fiona was almost begging, there was no time to be boastful or prideful, this was the only person who had shown her genuine kindness and she felt wretched for throwing that away for, what she thought at the time was, fame and fortune.

Tails shook his head and sighed looking at Fiona as he sat down on his sofa. 'You know i'm going to have to tell the others your back right?"
"Yeah I know... but you think we could wait a bit? let me prove i'm not the same gal that.... left them"
"you mean betrayed"
"yeah... yeah" she huffed and looked around the quaint home. "You uh need an assistant or anything like" she was fishing for answers and Tails knew it.
"No... no offense but not even Rotor can keep up with how I organize my things... if you really want to help I do have a bunch of food I forget about in the kitchen" It was here Fiona watched Tails begin to blush and rub the back of his head in embarrassment, it was rather cute. "sometimes I get so focused on a project I forget to eat so you would be a big help reminding me to eat."
"I see, I think i'll do one better, I know a few recipes" Tails's ears perked up hearing that small confession.
"Tell you what" Fiona snapped her fingers. "i'll make something right now just to show you!"
Tails blinked and rubbed his chin before giving her a small nod. The vixen took this time to rummage through the kitchen taking note of all the admittedly cheap ingredients the other fox owned. picking out what she wanted she got to work making a meal to try and impress Tails, who'd hopefully allow her to stay.

A few minutes later Tails wiggled his nose smelling the scent of herbs and sauce as Fiona approached where he was sitting with a large plate. "Pasta?" He raised an eye brow looking at the meal, it was a large portion of spaghetti topped with a bright red sauce. "It was the first thing I saw" Fiona admitted as Tails took a fork and sampled a bite. He didn't say anything but his tails did wag together. "Alright you can stay, but we will need to let the others know soon" He spoke wiping his muzzle. Fiona nodded and sighed in relief "right of course just uhh go ahead and finish and i can clean up for you" Tails chuckled a bit at seeing the formerly smug vixen acting nervous. Chowing down on the meal he was impressed at how delicious it was in the short amount of time it was made in, though he had to admit it was incredibly filling, he was used to smaller meals. Slurping the last of the noodles down he let out a soft huff and leaned back on the sofa letting out a heavy sigh and placing a hand on his furry belly. "wow... I don't think i've had so much at once before" Fiona couldn't help but chuckle sitting beside Tails and rubbing his belly. The two tailed fox couldn't help but blush at the attention and Fiona silently enjoyed how soft his fur was as well as the firmness of his full gut. "I guess I need to try and impress you with dinner then" she smiled as Tails blushed and rubbed his cheek.

info.description:
Sonic The hedgehog characters gain weight, all for a single reason, LOVE.

Anyone in the sonic couple can fatten up for example: Sonic can fatten up Amy or vise-versa, or they can both pack on the pounds.

Rules:

Strait couples only, (Although I support gay rights strait couples for fanfiction in interactive storys give the best sense of varity.)

Official characters only, (No offense to anyone who has 1 but, Fan chars make things too complicated.) If you are unfamiliar with any character simply look them up here http://archiesonic.wikia.com/wiki/Portal:People for proof that they are not fan-made.

Any character that gains weight must do so willingly, this is about love not misery.

Also at the beginning of the story all gaining characters are to be skinny, this is about weight gain after all, and it would be impossible to observe the effects of weight gain when they are already morbidly obese to begin with, wouldn't it?

Just because someone has already been used in 1 couple dosn't mean the can't be used for another. Have 1 character or 2 gain as much weight and as many times as you see fit.

You be the judge.

Enjoy.
